metadata.title: Fermentation and Bioreactors | Welltech®
metadata.description: Stainless steel industrial bioreactor and fermenter systems with high-level sterility for the multiplication of bacteria, yeast, and cell cultures.

hero.title: Fermentation and Bioreactors
hero.desc: Fully automatic, sterile (aseptic) reactor systems that allow microorganisms to multiply under ideal conditions for the biotechnology, pharmaceutical, and food industries.

technology.title: Precise Bioprocess Technology
technology.desc: Fermentation systems require a perfect balance for live microorganisms or cell cultures to grow. Welltech® Bioreactors simultaneously monitor pH, dissolved oxygen (DO), temperature, foam, and agitation speed (RPM) throughout the reaction and control them instantly via the automation panel. Internal surfaces designed with the zero dead leg principle (Ra < 0.4 µm) completely eliminate the risk of contamination.

features.title: Sterile Design and Automation
items: Double Wall / Jacketed Structure for Precise Temperature Control
Automatic pH, Dissolved Oxygen (DO), and Foam Control
Special Magnetic / Mechanical Agitators that Do Not Disrupt Cell Structure
User-Friendly HMI Touch Screen and SCADA Integration

table.title: Capacity and Technical Specifications
table.note: * The working volume is calculated as approximately 70-80% of the total tank volume. Projecting can be done for higher capacity industrial productions.

items.q: What does CIP and SIP compatibility mean?
items.a: CIP (Clean-in-Place) means the system can be washed without being dismantled, while SIP (Sterilization-in-Place) is the killing of all bacteria inside with high-temperature steam, preparing the system sterilely for the new culture.

items.q: Why is DO (Dissolved Oxygen) and pH control important?
items.a: It is mandatory to constantly keep the oxygen amount and acidity (pH) level in the environment at an ideal level so that bacteria or yeasts can reproduce without dying and secrete the targeted enzyme/product.

reference.desc: A 5,000 L capacity fully automatic enzyme fermentation line we installed for an international biotechnology company.

cta.title: SCADA Specific to Your Process
cta.desc: Design the most suitable mixing technology and sensor infrastructure for your cell culture together with our engineers.
